project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Final Assembly Readiness Check
scope: parse data/reports/r3_9l_human_regenerated_clip_review_decision_apply_result.json as the source of truth
verify the four required shots have accepted active generated clips
verify accepted clip files exist locally and ffprobe returns PASS
build a deterministic assembly input manifest in storyboard order
goal: Confirm whether all required shots have accepted active generated clips and whether the project is ready for a separate local final assembly dry-run.
acceptance: Report includes one row per required shot with accepted artifact id, local mp4 path, ffprobe status, duration, and source generation task.
Report result is PASS_READY_FOR_FINAL_ASSEMBLY_DRY_RUN only if all four required shots are accepted and valid.
If any shot is missing, rejected, regenerate_requested, inactive, unreadable, or ffprobe-invalid, report BLOCK_FINAL_ASSEMBLY_WITH_REASON.

Report records network_call_attempted=false, runninghub_called=false, runway_called=false, real_video_generated=false, final_assembly_performed=false, env_files_read=false, credentials_read=false, source_assets_overwritten=false, secret_values_exposed=false.
validation: JSON parse for generated readiness report
ffprobe evidence check from existing reports or local metadata
claimed_by: Codex R3-9M final assembly readiness check
completed_by: Codex R3-9M final assembly readiness check
boundary_or_safety_stop: readiness check only; no provider call, regeneration execution, final assembly, env or credential read, source overwrite, push, tag, release, or deploy
safe_actions_completed: Parsed R3-9L decision apply report as the source of truth.
Verified all 4 required shots have accepted active generated_clip video artifacts.
Verified all 4 accepted MP4 paths exist locally and ffprobe returns PASS.
Built a deterministic assembly input manifest in storyboard order.
Recorded that final assembly was not performed and no final video was written.
Validated JSON parse, path checks, ffprobe evidence, npm run typecheck, npm run test:m1, npm run secret:scan, and git diff --check.
next_safe_option: Proceed to R3-9N final video assembly dry run only.
